title: Re-sequence project-lead for the bracket
description:
Re-sequence project-lead to scaffold the bracket, enforce the plan-review gate, break down only after approval, enforce coverage at breakdown, then implement. Reads breakable types from the ruleset and is configurable.

## Success Criteria

- [ ] For a breakable container, project-lead scaffolds the planning node and blocks breakdown until plan-review passes.
- [ ] Breakable types are read from the ruleset, not hardcoded, and the behavior is configurable.
